## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential SEO and content marketing collaboration between Dimmo and fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers comprehensive AI-assisted content creation and SEO services, tailored for rapid growth and domain authority building](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Dimmo needs to prioritize traffic growth and SEO as core product components to compete effectively in their market](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [A 3-month pilot program with fwd.digital could help Dimmo assess the impact and ROI of aggressive content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI-assisted workflows with human oversight for high-quality, scalable content production](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Includes keyword research, title generation, outline creation, and multiple review stages](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Employs a "Content OS" for managing assignments and tracking metrics](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Can produce up to 1200 pages/year of new and enriched content](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Offers programmatic SEO capabilities for large-scale page creation](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)

### SEO Strategy and Results

  - [Focuses on building domain authority and organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Emphasizes patience in seeing results, typically 6-12 months for significant impact](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Showcases success stories like Bardeen (3x ROI) and programmatic SEO examples](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

### Dimmo's Current Situation and Needs

  - [Recently launched marketplace (7 months ago) with 500 companies](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Prioritizing traffic growth as a core business need](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Considering transition from event-based marketing to scalable content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Evaluating the cost-benefit of outsourcing vs. in-house content creation](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

### Engagement Structure

  - [Typical engagements are 6-12 months with a 3-month pilot period](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [Full-service offering includes strategy, execution, and ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Priced at $9,000/month, comparable to hiring a junior marketing position](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Troy to discuss the proposal with his team at Dimmo](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)
  - [Marcel to send a Statement of Work (SOW) for Troy to review](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1990.0)
  - [Consider January 13th as a potential kickoff date if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Evaluate the feasibility and potential ROI of a 3-month pilot program with fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/QWunAeEtS-nBB9S1iwGzFbFmPA_c-oUG?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
